payload.answer: I can’t safely turn this into a memory as written because the pronoun and referent are unresolved.
citations: LLM proposal - {"memory_cards" -[{"kind" -"preference","statement" -"He prefers the other one","confidence" -"medium"}]}
repair_options: Clarify who "he" refers to and what "the other one" refers to, then restate the preference explicitly.
Rewrite the statement with named entities or concrete referents before saving it.
Keep it uncommitted until the pronouns are resolved.
